title: Wrap order lines in a collection type
scenario: A collection wrapper can own a Vec while keeping later invariants and iteration APIs under one type.
instructions: Define OrderLines with a private Vec<OrderLine>, a constructor, len, and is_empty.

hints.body: Keep OrderLine as the element type and add an OrderLines wrapper around Vec<OrderLine>.
Keep the lines field private, then expose new, len, and is_empty as the public API.
One complete solution for Wrap order lines in a collection type is shown below.

completionExplanation: OrderLines now owns the Vec while keeping the raw collection private, leaving room for iteration APIs and invariants on one type.
